cases.title: 14-month-old with diarrhea
cases.presentation: A mother brings her 14-month-old daughter to the health post. The child has had watery diarrhea for 3 days.
expected_treatment: Give ORS (Plan B): treat in facility for 4 hours
teaching_points: Two signs of dehydration (restless + drinks eagerly + skin pinch slow) = SOME dehydration
Plan B means 4 hours of supervised ORS at the facility
Zinc reduces duration and severity of diarrhea
